data.title: Vietnam Holding Issues Additional Shares to Meet Market Demand
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

The latest update is out from Vietnam Holding ( (GB:VNH) ).

Vietnam Holding Limited announced the issuance of 6,500 new ordinary shares to meet market demand, correcting a previous administrative error regarding the settlement date. The new shares will be admitted for trading on the London Stock Exchange and the International Stock Exchange from January 6, 2025, increasing the company’s total voting rights to 23,753,889 ordinary shares, which stakeholders can use to assess their interests under the FCA’s guidelines.

More about Vietnam Holding

Vietnam Holding Limited operates in the financial industry and focuses on investments and equity management. The company primarily deals with securities and shares, aiming to satisfy market demands and maintain a robust presence in the investment market.

YTD Price Performance: 26.77%

Average Trading Volume: 39,776

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

data.title: Woodward to Acquire Safran’s Actuation Division
data.description:

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!

Woodward is set to acquire Safran’s electromechanical actuation activities in North America, enhancing its technology platform for next-generation aircraft. This strategic move aligns with Woodward’s growth strategy and strengthens its offerings in the aerospace market. The acquisition is expected to close in mid-2025, subject to standard regulatory approvals.

data.title: TCTM Kids IT Education Inc. Announces CFO Resignation
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

The latest announcement is out from Tarena International ( (TCTM) ).

TCTM Kids IT Education Inc. announced the resignation of its Chief Financial Officer, Mr. Xiaobo Shao, effective December 18, 2024, due to personal reasons. The resignation does not stem from any disagreement with the company, and the CEO, Mr. Xiaolan Tang, will serve as acting CFO as the company searches for a replacement. This change in leadership is a critical transition for TCTM, potentially impacting its operational focus and stakeholder confidence as they navigate the interim period.

More about Tarena International

TCTM Kids IT Education Inc. is a prominent provider of IT-focused supplementary STEM education services in China. The company offers a variety of educational programs, including computer coding and robotics programming, targeting children and teenagers aged three to eighteen. TCTM utilizes a comprehensive approach that includes live distance instruction, classroom-based tutoring, and online learning modules to foster logical thinking and learning abilities among students.

YTD Price Performance: -24.67%

Average Trading Volume: 208,444

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $8.54M

The latest announcement is out from UIL Ltd ( (GB:UTL) ).

UIL Limited has announced a first quarterly interim dividend of 2.00 pence per ordinary share for the financial year ending on 30 June 2025. data.title: Comstock Mining Sells Stake to Mackay Precious Metals
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Comstock Mining ( (LODE) ) has shared an announcement.

Comstock Inc. has sold its entire interest in Comstock Northern Exploration LLC and a 25% stake in Pelen LLC to Mackay Precious Metals Inc. for $2.75 million, with part of the payment made in cash and the rest in cash or stock. The deal, which includes a 1.5% royalty on net smelter returns, enables Comstock to focus on advancing other projects and expanding its gold and silver potential in the southern part of its district, aligning with its strategic growth in the gold and silver cycle.

More about Comstock Mining

Comstock Inc. specializes in commercializing innovative technologies that aid in global decarbonization and clean energy transitions. They primarily focus on converting under-utilized natural resources, such as woody biomass, into low-carbon renewable fuels and end-of-life metal extraction and renewal. Additionally, they engage in generative AI-enabled advanced materials synthesis and mineral discovery for sustainable mining.

YTD Price Performance: -45.27%

Average Trading Volume: 3,434,866

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $66.06M

data.title: Olav Thon Eiendomsselskap Restructures Shopping Center Holdings
data.description:
Olav Thon Eiendomsselskap ASA (GB:0FHP) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Olav Thon Eiendomsselskap ASA and Coop Norge Eiendom AS are restructuring their joint ownership of Amco Eiendom AS, with OLT acquiring full ownership of Amfi Sogningen and Amfi Eidsvoll shopping centers, and CNE taking over Amfi Årnes and other shares. The transaction, valued at MNOK 830 for OLT’s acquisitions and MNOK 430 for CNE’s, aligns with the companies’ book values and is set to close on December 30, 2024.
